name: Fiddlesticks
title: The Harbinger of Doom
shortBio:
- The Abilities are completely different, except for the ultimate Crowstorm (R)
- Fiddlesticks fear makes the enemy walk randomly

skins.name: Bandito Fiddlesticks

chromas.name: Bandito Fiddlesticks (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: If the day ever comes, riding those dusty trails, when a thin man in a wide hat appears far in the distance… run. Ride hard and fast and never look back, lest the horror known as Fiddlesticks drag you to from your saddle, and into darkness.

skins.name: Surprise Party Fiddlesticks

chromas.name: Surprise Party Fiddlesticks (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: Everyone told you hiring a clown would be a good idea. “Clowns are great for parties,” they said. But now everyone's missing, and the power is out, and something's laughing just down the hall...

skins.name: Star Nemesis Fiddlesticks

chromas.name: Star Nemesis Fiddlesticks (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Star Nemesis Fiddlesticks (Wicked)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Star Guardian event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Star Guardian event.

skins.description: The creature known as Fiddlesticks has fed on Star Guardians across every era, hunting those on the verge of falling before finally consuming their light. Its connection to the Guardians, and the reason it is drawn to them, is not well understood... but the familiar seemingly trapped within it suggests a truly disturbing origin.

skins.name: Flora Fatalis Fiddlesticks

chromas.name: Flora Fatalis Fiddlesticks (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2025.

skins.description: When this creature first tasted our nectar, we sensed it was unnatural. It had curiosity. Hubris. Ingesting our poison to reap the benefits, while unaware of the consequences. Even now it attempts to resist Us. What a strange host. Does it not understand what we can accomplish? Together, with stick and spore, we would sow unbridled fear.

passive.name: Dread
passive.description: Nearby enemies have reduced Magic Resist.

spells.name: Terrify
spells.description: Strikes a target unit with fear, causing it to flee in terror for a duration.
spells.dynamicDescription: Fiddlesticks strikes a target enemy with fear, causing it to aimlessly <status>Flee</status> for @FearDuration@ second(s).@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Drain
spells.description: Fiddlesticks saps the life force of an enemy, dealing damage to a target over time and healing himself.
spells.dynamicDescription: Fiddlesticks channels for @DrainDuration@ seconds and drains an enemy dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamagePerSecond@ magic damage</magicDamage> each second to target unit and Fiddlesticks restores <healing>@VampPercentage*100@% of damage as Health</healing>@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Dark Wind
spells.description: A wisp of wind strikes an enemy unit and then bounces to nearby enemy units, dealing damage and silencing the victims.
spells.dynamicDescription: A wisp of wind strikes an enemy target and then bounces up to @MaxNumberOfBounces@ times to nearby enemy units. Deals <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Silences</status> for @SilenceDuration@ seconds for each strike. Targets are only <status>Silenced</status> once per cast.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Crowstorm
spells.description: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage each second to all enemy units in the area.
spells.dynamicDescription: Fiddlesticks channels for @ChannelTime@ seconds, then teleports and unleashes a murder of crows, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> over @Duration@ seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
